requirement_topic.en: OCPP Readiness, EMC Evidence, and French Back-Office Documentation
requirement_topic.zh: OCPP就绪、EMC证据与法语后台文件
requirement_topic.zht: OCPP就緒、EMC證據與法語後台文件

summary.en: No official Gabon national public-charger OCPP platform requirement could be confirmed as of 2026-06-14. However, networked public, fleet, hotel, mining, logistics, or donor-funded chargers should be expected to require OCPP-compatible back-office operation, remote monitoring, access control, consumption reporting, and maintenance diagnostics. EMC and power-quality evidence should be prepared under the IEC 61000 series and referenced in AGANOR, importer, SEEG, or project-owner review. French-language commissioning, cybersecurity, data, and operator documentation should be available because Gabon is a Francophone market.
summary.zh: 截至2026年6月14日，未能确认加蓬存在官方全国公共充电OCPP平台要求。然而，联网公共、车队、酒店、矿业、物流或捐助方资助充电桩预计会要求OCPP兼容后台运营、远程监控、访问控制、用电报告和维护诊断。EMC和电能质量证据应按IEC 61000体系准备，并用于AGANOR、进口商、SEEG或项目业主审查。由于加蓬为法语市场，应提供法语调试、网络安全、数据和运营商文件。
summary.zht: 截至2026年6月14日，未能確認加彭存在官方全國公共充電OCPP平台要求。然而，聯網公共、車隊、酒店、礦業、物流或捐助方資助充電樁預計會要求OCPP兼容後台運營、遠程監控、訪問控制、用電報告和維護診斷。EMC和電能質量證據應按IEC 61000體系準備，並用於AGANOR、進口商、SEEG或項目業主審查。由於加彭為法語市場，應提供法語調試、網絡安全、數據和運營商文件。

standards_or_laws: OCPP — Open Charge Point Protocol for networked charger back-office communication
IEC 63584 — international standardization context for OCPP
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
AGANOR conformity and project-owner technical documentation requirements
SEEG site power-quality and connection review

summary.en: China DC fast chargers commonly implement GB/T 27930-2023 between the off-board charger and vehicle BMS. That vehicle-side CAN communication does not provide OCPP back-office interoperability and is not compatible with CCS2 deployments requiring IEC 61851-24 or ISO 15118. China domestic operator platforms may use proprietary protocols or OCPP variants, but the specific Gabon project must verify the required OCPP version, security profile, SIM/router arrangement, and data hosting model.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充通常在非车载充电机与车辆BMS之间采用GB/T 27930-2023。该车端CAN通信不能提供OCPP后台互操作，也不能兼容要求IEC 61851-24或ISO 15118的CCS2部署。中国国内运营商平台可能使用私有协议或OCPP变体，但具体加蓬项目必须核实所需OCPP版本、安全配置、SIM/路由器安排和数据托管模式。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充通常在非車載充電機與車輛BMS之間採用GB/T 27930-2023。該車端CAN通訊不能提供OCPP後台互操作，也不能兼容要求IEC 61851-24或ISO 15118的CCS2部署。中國國內運營商平台可能使用私有協議或OCPP變體，但具體加彭項目必須核實所需OCPP版本、安全配置、SIM/路由器安排和數據託管模式。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and BMS
GB/T electromagnetic compatibility requirements for EV charging equipment

gap.en: Exporters should confirm: (1) OCPP version and security profile required by the Gabon project; (2) French-language user, installer, and operator documentation; (3) IEC 61000 EMC and harmonic evidence for the intended power level; (4) cellular or Ethernet connectivity and local data requirements; (5) remote fault reporting and load-management functions; (6) replacement of GB/T 27930 vehicle communication with CCS2-compatible IEC communication where DC CCS2 is specified.
gap.zh: 出口商应确认：(1) 加蓬项目所需OCPP版本和安全配置；(2) 法语用户、安装方和运营商文件；(3) 目标功率等级对应的IEC 61000 EMC和谐波证据；(4) 蜂窝或以太网连接及本地数据要求；(5) 远程故障报告和负载管理功能；(6) 如指定直流CCS2，应将GB/T 27930车端通信替换为兼容CCS2的IEC通信。
gap.zht: 出口商應確認：(1) 加彭項目所需OCPP版本和安全配置；(2) 法語用戶、安裝方和運營商文件；(3) 目標功率等級對應的IEC 61000 EMC和諧波證據；(4) 蜂窩或以太網連接及本地數據要求；(5) 遠程故障報告和負載管理功能；(6) 如指定直流CCS2，應將GB/T 27930車端通訊替換為兼容CCS2的IEC通訊。

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent — no national Gabon OCPP mandate could be confirmed; OCPP and IEC 61000 evidence are likely mandatory when required by network, fleet, donor, importer, SEEG, or site-owner specifications
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is mandatory for China domestic DC vehicle communication but is not OCPP and is not a CCS2 communication substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Gabon does not have a confirmed national OCPP platform requirement, but networked chargers should still be specified with OCPP, IEC 61000 EMC evidence, French documentation, and CCS2-compatible communication when DC fast charging is planned.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 加蓬尚未确认全国OCPP平台要求，但联网充电桩仍应配置OCPP、IEC 61000 EMC证据、法语文件，并在规划直流快充时采用兼容CCS2的通信。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 加彭尚未確認全國OCPP平台要求，但聯網充電樁仍應配置OCPP、IEC 61000 EMC證據、法語文件，並在規劃直流快充時採用兼容CCS2的通訊。
